creator: tahkun-GNATS@milkcup.jp
text:
1.If "kldload vboxdrv.ko" is executed to execute emulators/virtualbox,
kernel panic is generated. 

2.panic message
xvebronxedlr vt:r afpA s1y2n cw=i0t ho fifnMtienr=r0uxp1tcs8  doifsfaMbalxe=d0
892


Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode

CPU: Intel(R) Core(TM)2 Duo CPU     E6750  @ 2.66GHz (2669.69-MHz 686-class CPU)
Memory: 2GB
Mother Board: G33 neo(http://www.msi.com/index.php?func=proddesc&maincat_no=1&prod_no=1224)
